title: Transgenic tools targeting the basal ganglia in zebrafish
author: Tanimoto, Yuki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The single-cell RNA sequencing data and the R markdown script used for the Seurat analysis published in the Tanimoto et al., Cell Reports, in press. For details, please see the original paper entitiled "Transgenic tools targeting the basal ganglia reveal both evolutionary conservation and specialization of neural circuits in zebrafish", Tanimoto et al., Cell Reports, in press.
